question: What is the maximum Earned Leave carry-forward balance?
clean_answer: A maximum of 45 days of Earned Leave may be carried forward at the end of each financial year (31 March). Employees are eligible to encash up to 50% of their available Earned Leave balance once per financial year,
answer_with_sources: A maximum of 45 days of Earned Leave may be carried forward at the end of each financial year (31 March). Employees are eligible to encash up to 50% of their available Earned Leave balance once per financial year,
reference_answer: A maximum of 45 Earned Leave days may be carried forward. Any excess is automatically encashed at the employee's basic daily rate and credited in the April payroll.
